top_listing_package.source_design_title: Christian Streetwear Shirts: Hope Forward Statement Tee
top_listing_package.product_title: Christian Streetwear Shirts - Hope Forward Statement Tee Custom Faith Shirt for Family Church Gifts
top_listing_package.seo_title: Christian Streetwear Shirts - Hope Forward Statement Tee Custom Faith Shirt for Family Church Gifts | Christian Streetwear Shirts, Personal…
top_listing_package.description:
Christian Streetwear Shirts - Hope Forward Statement Tee Custom Faith Shirt for Family Church Gifts

Create a meaningful made-to-order gift with a polished RAMFAM Kingdom/SIS Custom Creations production standard.

Why shoppers will like it:
- Built around the proven Hunter opportunity: christian streetwear shirts.
- Design direction from Micah: A bold FRESH-aligned statement shirt built around encouragement, service, and everyday witness without copying common slogans. Hunter offer context: Use this as a design-validation keyword, but only build after finding a stronger niche angle.
- Visual execution notes: Modern typography-led shirt graphic with kinetic layout, small icon accents, and optional meal-giving impact line.
- Personalization-friendly so buyers can request names, dates, church/team names, or short approved wording where the product allows.

Ordering notes:
1. Choose the product option and quantity.
2. Add personalization details exactly as they should appear.
3. Amanda/Manny review final wording, pricing, and production limits before public launch or customer commitment.

Offer context: Use this as a design-validation keyword, but only build after finding a stronger niche angle.

Compliance note: Final art must avoid copyrighted characters, protected brand marks, celebrity names, unlicensed lyrics, and trademarked slogans.
materials: DTF, screen print, or vinyl transfer
top_listing_package.occasion: Church event, family gathering, retreat, teacher appreciation, everyday faith wear
top_listing_package.recipient: Families, church groups, teachers, youth ministries, faith-based shoppers
top_listing_package.category_recommendation: Clothing > Unisex Adult Clothing > Tops & Tees > T-shirts

pricing_suggestion.rationale: Price inside or slightly above Hunter's sampled market range, then adjust after Manny reviews blank cost, labor, Etsy fees, shipping, personalization complexity, and desired margin.

production_notes: Confirm blank/product cost, supplier availability, labor time, packaging, shipping class, and Etsy fees before publishing.
Create final production art from owned or properly licensed fonts and graphics only.
Run a small sample or internal proof before accepting custom orders at scale.
Check transfer size, shirt color contrast, wash-care language, and size chart accuracy.
mockup_notes: Use mockups that clearly show the product category: Clothing > Unisex Adult Clothing > Tops & Tees > T-shirts.
Reflect Micah art direction: Modern typography-led shirt graphic with kinetic layout, small icon accents, and optional meal-giving impact line.
Include at least one hero image, one close-up/detail image, one personalization example, and one scale/context image.
Keep mockup styling aligned with this color palette: washed black, off white, sunrise orange, royal blue, muted gold.
Do not publish mockups until Manny approves final wording, price, and production feasibility.
top_listing_package.manny_approval_requirement: Manny approval is required before publishing this listing, changing live pricing, spending ad budget, contacting customers, accepting custom orders, or making any public/reputation-impacting marketplace action.
